'''dabowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wacinko|wacinko]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wacinko|wacinko]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dabowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæbeweth|dæbeweth]] || [[word:dæbewej|dæbewej]] || [[word:dæbewesh|dæbewesh]] || [[word:dæbewe|dæbewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dabobowoth|dabobowoth]] || [[word:dabobowoj|dabobowoj]] || [[word:dabobowosh|dabobowosh]] || [[word:dabobowo|dabobowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dabowoth|dabowoth]] || [[word:dabowoj|dabowoj]] || [[word:dabowosh|dabowosh]] || [[word:dabowo|dabowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dabofwoth|dabofwoth]] || [[word:dabofwoj|dabofwoj]] || [[word:dabofwosh|dabofwosh]] || [[word:dabofwof|dabofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dabowotho|dabowotho]] || [[word:dabowojo|dabowojo]] || [[word:dabowosho|dabowosho]] || [[word:dabowoko|dabowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dabowoth|dabowoth]] || [[word:dabowoj|dabowoj]] || [[word:dabowosh|dabowosh]] || [[word:dabowo|dabowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dabowothol|dabowothol]] || [[word:dabowojol|dabowojol]] || [[word:dabowoshol|dabowoshol]] || [[word:dabowokol|dabowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dabowothotho|dabowothotho]] || [[word:dabowojojo|dabowojojo]] || [[word:dabowoshosho|dabowoshosho]] || [[word:dabowoko|dabowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dabowothon|dabowothon]] || [[word:dabowojon|dabowojon]] || [[word:dabowoshon|dabowoshon]] || [[word:dabowokon|dabowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dabowothoro|dabowothoro]] || [[word:dabowojoro|dabowojoro]] || [[word:dabowoshoro|dabowoshoro]] || [[word:dabowokoro|dabowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
